questions.question: What is the primary function of an entity type in conceptual data modelling?
questions.hint: Describe the function of an entity type with an entity set.

questions.question: Explain the difference between a weak entity type and a strong entity type in conceptual data modelling.
questions.hint: Provide a clear distinction between the two types of entity types.

questions.question: Sketch a simple ER diagram to represent the following relationship: A course is offered by a lecturer, and each course has multiple sessions. The lecturer has multiple courses and multiple sessions. What are the entity types and relationship cardinalities in this diagram?
questions.hint: Use the entity-relationship diagram notation (e.g., A—->B) to represent the relationships.
